title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D.
summary:
The missions of the Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division. (source: IMDb)

Note: This show is quite a mess for watching order since every episode takes place at a different time along the entire Infinity Saga. If you don't want to take the risk to spoil yourself, we recommand you to watch it all after Avengers: Endgame.
